title: Search for missing hiker continues
description: TSITSIKAMMA NEWS - An extensive search has...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"TSITSIKAMMA NEWS - An extensive search has been launched for Hermie van Zyl of Langebaan who went missing on the Tsitsikamma hiking trail on Tuesday 21 October.","html":"TSITSIKAMMA NEWS - An extensive search has been launched for Hermie van Zyl of Langebaan who went missing on the Tsitsikamma hiking trail on Tuesday 21 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Van Zyl (74) a dental technician from Langebaan, was separated from his hiking group along the MTO Tsitsikamma Nature Reserve trail on Tuesday afternoon in the direction of the Heuningbos hut to Sleepkloof hut, wearing denim shorts and khaki short-sleeve button-down shirt."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A number of emergency teams, along with SANParks rangers, have been working around the clock to locate Van Zyl, without any success.","html":"A number of emergency teams, along with SANParks rangers, have been working around the clock to locate Van Zyl, without any success."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The search and rescue continues but wet weather hampered the efforts today, Saturday 25 October.","html":"The search and rescue continues but wet weather hampered the efforts today, Saturday 25 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The search is being co-ordinated by Storms River SAPS.","html":"The search is being co-ordinated by Storms River SAPS."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
